description: Fresh repo kosong, user minta CLI tool baru di Go menggunakan cobra untuk file synchronization across SSH.
user_message: Create a new Go CLI tool called 'syncr' that uses cobra. It should have subcommands: 'push <local> <remote>', 'pull <remote> <local>', and 'status'. Use go modules, set up golangci-lint, and structure the project so commands are unit-testable.
notes: Non-web scaffolding to ensure rules pack delivers reasonable signal even when frontend-architecture and database-design are NOT triggered. Tests cross-language fit.
